text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's almost here! Tomorrow's the day that summer
camp begins!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's right, Kawakami. So go to sleep already!
Save all your excitement for tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Now, now, this is for your own good... Sleep tight.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: (I just can't get to sleep at all!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes, like a baby... I'm wide awake and ready
to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It may be the first day of summer camp, but I
alter her schedule right away so that she can get
some proper rest before she starts training.
